appliedItems.title: fried format is a major category negative
appliedItems.explanation: This drags tubers away from the cleaner energy-food role the category is supposed to reward.

appliedItems.title: glycemic behaviour is rough
appliedItems.explanation: A major practical strike against the food in a carb-behaviour category.

appliedItems.title: energy density is much harsher than ideal
appliedItems.explanation: Much easier to overshoot calories than with cleaner tuber forms.

summary: Fats are carrying this food most, while minerals are the biggest drag. It lands in D tier.
